value_chain_position: High-performance analog/mixed-signal semiconductors — sells precision data converters, amplifiers and power-management ICs into data-center power, industrial automation, automotive and communications.
relative_comps: ADI and TXN are the two dominant high-performance analog franchises; ADI skews more toward high-precision/high-speed converters (communications, defense, industrial test) where it has fewer substitutes. Revenue declined during the 2023-24 analog downcycle (-28% trough) but has recovered strongly (+30% YoY). FCF margin of 36% is the highest in analog. The energy-transition linkage is real (EV battery management, grid monitoring) but not a primary revenue driver. Trades at ~28x forward earnings, in line with TXN.
